No interrupt or turn-cap exists. PRESUMPTION-054 formalizes the risk. Whether this is a healthy long-running deep-research task or a runaway loop remains unknowable without a task-level invariant.
    - CRITICAL GAP STILL PENDING (day 4 now): the null-baseline re-extraction test for PRESUMPTION-029 + ASSUMPTION-031 has not moved since 2026-04-16. Pipeline gate unchanged.

**Trajectory assessment:** Monday 2026-04-20 was a quiet-but-signal-rich day. The PRS corpus held flat (no ingestion completed due to the five-day-old stale git lock blocking Phase 6), but the self-awareness registry grew by 10 items (4 assumptions + 6 presumptions, ~11% growth from 2026-04-18). The signal concentration is unusual: the day yielded two new cluster shapes — BRIEFING-LAYER-EPISTEMIC-COMMITMENTS (ASSUMPTION-046/047/048 + PRESUMPTION-053) and CROSS-TASK-COORDINATION (PRESUMPTION-049/051/054) — that reorganize how we should think about morning-briefing construction and inter-task contracts respectively. The ratio of presumptions-to-assumptions inverted from the usual 1:1 pattern to 6:4, reflecting that today's work was largely autonomous (more inferable background premises, fewer explicit Tom-stated commitments). The first-ever skipped self-awareness cycle (2026-04-19) was logged as a GAP-NOTE rather than backfilled, preserving the provenance trail. The pipeline-lag metric jumped from 0 to 2 days (today's batch plus 2026-04-18's QUEUED batch both await 15a/15b/15c), and a new infrastructure signal — the Levin-Friston specialist task exceeding 58 WebSearch turns with no writes — surfaces PRESUMPTION-054 and raises OPEN-033 on turn/cost caps. Three new OPEN questions formalize the new clusters: OPEN-031 (scheduler-level coordination contract), OPEN-032 (generalize transience-threshold structure across OPERATIONAL-DRIFT channels), and OPEN-033 (specialist-task invariants). The DEGRADED-COMPOUNDED git state is now five calendar days old and is the single highest-priority unblock — without it, the wiki Phase 6 remains frozen, making "pending proposals = 10" a fiction (the real count includes today's 2 Levin proposals that cannot commit). If any one action moves Tuesday's run forward most, it is the manual `.git/index.lock` removal plus DECISION-018 rescue-script execution.
